html:
Exclusive to:

The Obsidian Fire Pit is exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC and the Obsidian version of the normal Fire Pit. It requires 3 Logs and 8 Obsidian to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It allows Fuel to last 3 times as long as a Campfire and 1.5 times as long as a Fire Pit, while also emitting a massive light radius, making this the most effective and resource-friendly fire. Obsidian Fire Pit doesn't set surrounding objects on Fire (unlike the Campfire)

The Obsidian Fire Pit is immune to being extinguished by Strong Winds, but can be flooded (at a rate of 10 compared to Fire Pit's 500). In rain, a Obsidian Fire Pit may burn its fuel up to 200% faster (depending on precipitation rate), like a Fire Pit. The Ice Flingomatic can still extinguish the Obsidian Fire Pit if within range.

Two Charcoal will be dropped by a Obsidian Fire Pit that has reached at least 3/4 of the way to maximum fuel (or 3 logs) when it goes out.

Gallery

  • Woodlegs standing next to an Obsidian Fire Pit.

"obsidianfirepit"
“This fire pit is a conductor for even more... fire.”
–Wilson
“I could watch it for hours.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang did good job!”
–Wolfgang
“A flame to keep the horrors at bay.”
–Wendy
“A FLAWLESS STRUCTURE”
–WX-78
“To keep quite warm.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like the perfect place to light a fire.”
–Woodie
“The stone was born for this.”
–Maxwell
“The obsidian is a fantastic conductor of thermal energy.”
–Wagstaff
“A fire fit för a Viking!”
–Wigfrid
“We made the fire stones into a fire home!”
–Webber
“Oh, sweet enemy of darkness.”
–Walani
“To warm my fingers and roast sausages.”
–Warly
“Need ta be careful ta not burn me legs.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS GOOD FWOOSHINGS”
–Wilba
“Not too close”
–Wormwood
“I know a thing or two about hot air.”
–Wheeler
The Obsidian Fire Pit is exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC and the Obsidian version of the normal Fire Pit. It requires 3 Logs and 8 Obsidian to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It allows Fuel to last 3 times as long as a Campfire and 1.5 times as long as a Fire Pit, while also emitting a massive light radius, making this the most effective and resource-friendly fire. Obsidian Fire Pit doesn't set surrounding objects on Fire (unlike the Campfire)
The Obsidian Fire Pit is immune to being extinguished by Strong Winds, but can be flooded (at a rate of 10 compared to Fire Pit's 500). In rain, a Obsidian Fire Pit may burn its fuel up to 200% faster (depending on precipitation rate), like a Fire Pit. The Ice Flingomatic can still extinguish the Obsidian Fire Pit if within range.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hố lửa Obsidian chỉ có trong Shipwrecked DLC và phiên bản Obsidian của Hố lửa thông thường. Nó cần 3 Gỗ và 8 Đá Vỏ Chai để chế tạo, và cần Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó cho phép Nhiên liệu tồn tại lâu gấp 3 lần Lửa trại và dài gấp 1,5 lần Lò lửa, đồng thời phát ra bán kính ánh sáng lớn, khiến đây trở thành ngọn lửa hiệu quả và thân thiện với tài nguyên nhất. Hố lửa Obsidian không đốt cháy các vật thể xung quanh (không giống như Lửa trại)
title: Obsidian Fire Pit
